_comment: Single source of truth for the menu. Edit dishes here (or in the Google Sheet — see README-MENU.md). status: active | soldout | hidden.

settings._sheetCsvUrl_help: Paste your published-to-web Google Sheet CSV link here to make the sheet the live menu source. Leave empty to use the dishes below.
